items.title: Strapping 11 fans and a 360mm AIO to an RTX 3080 sounds crazy until you see the 30°C temp drop — modded GPU delivered less than 5 FPS uplift at turbojet noise levels
items.description: TrashBench recently decided to test whether adding more and more fans to a powerful GPU would improve its performance.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 2 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter TrashBench recently decided to test whether adding more and more fans to what used to be one of the best graphics cards would improve its performance. The result wasn’t significantly faster performance, sadly, even when the thermal headroom was used for overclocking (vs. stock OC). Nevertheless, lessons were learned, and the self-described “punk-rock GPU death lab” was still proud of the temperature reductions, plus the GPU contraption's “awesome” looks and sounds.The experiment began with an overview of the Asus ROG GeForce RTX 3080, a nice example of the breed. But it was a choice that would perhaps end up making the 11-fan wonder look like less of an accomplishment. TrashBench stated the goal was to add more and more fans, plus duct tape and cable ties, then see whether the reduced temperatures from the boosted airflow result in more frames.After cleaning and repasting the guinea pig GPU, a baseline was set with the stock cooler. Running 100% fan speed on the Asus ROG resulted in a stable temperature of 63°C (down from 70°C) during stress testing with the Unigine Heaven benchmark.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: I Put 11 Fans on an RTX 3080 - YouTube Watch On Replacing the Asus ROG cooling shroud with a trio of Arctic case fans dropped the reported GPU temperatures to a stable 52 degrees Celsius. That’s a decent result. Next, the trio of case fans was swapped for thicker server fans, shaving another 2 degrees Celsius off the GPU temperature, bringing it to 50 degrees Celsius precisely. Duct tape was added to prevent air venting from the sides of the server fans. Oops, the GPU temperature actually stabilized at a warmer 54 degrees Celsius.So, that was the end of fans-at-the-front modifications. TrashBench next looked at adding a quintet of tiny Arctic server fans that run at up to 15,000 RPM along the top of the card. This jet-engine-soundalike configuration didn’t shift the needle, though. The RTX 3080 still wouldn’t hold below 50 degrees Celsius when tested for any length of time. You may like Ingenious modder converts countertop ice machine into an RTX 3060 GPU cooler with a beer fridge thermostat Enthusiast creates Peltier thermoelectric cooler from scratch Reviewer tests 'RTX 4080M' desktop graphics card powered by salvaged laptop silicon Swipe to scroll horizontallySOTTR 1440p testsCooling configPerformanceStock178 FPS11 fans180 FPSStock OC183 FPS11 fans OC187 FPSTrying backplate fans was the next idea. After another ineffective endeavor, though, TrashBench decided to upgrade the backplate fan to an AiO 360mm cooler. Wow - a new best was recorded with this setup, with the GPU reporting a top stable temperature of just 41 degrees Celsius in Heaven.Momentarily happy with this low-temperature achievement, the tech tinkerer decided to check whether benchmark runs in Shadow of the Tomb Raider showed any benefit. There were some performance uplifts charted, but only very modest, as you can see from our results table, which even includes cases where the newfound overclocking headroom was taken advantage of.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsorsTrashBench concluded with some positives. “It nearly cut the temperatures in half. It looks awesome. It sounds awesome,” underlined our hardware hacking hero. However, the tech tinkerer kept it real by adding “And it got me 2 FPS. So, not worth it.” In some ways, then, the good quality of the stock triple-fan Asus ROG RTX 3080 graphics card detracted from the 11 extra-fan hijinks. items.author: Mark Tyson
items.titleZh: 将11个风扇和360mm水冷捆绑到RTX 3080上听起来很疯狂，直到你看到30°C的温度降——改装的显卡在涡轮喷气机噪音水平下仅带来不到5帧的性能提升
items.descriptionZh:
TrashBench——一个自称“朋克摇滚GPU死亡实验室”的硬件改造团队，最近进行了一项疯狂实验：在一张原本性能就已十分出色的华硕ROG RTX 3080显卡上，不断加装风扇，最终达到11个风扇的夸张配置，试图通过极致降温来压榨出更高性能。然而，实验结果令人哭笑不得：虽然温度几乎减半（从原装散热器下的63°C降至水冷+多风扇组合的41°C），但在《古墓丽影：暗影》1440p分辨率下的帧率提升仅有2 FPS（原装178 FPS vs 11风扇180 FPS，超频后原装183 FPS vs 11风扇187 FPS）。实验最终被评价为“听起来很酷，看起来也很酷，但只多了2帧，完全不值得”。

实验过程非常详尽。首先，团队对华硕ROG RTX 3080进行清洁并重新涂抹硅脂，以原装三风扇散热器作为基准。在Unigine Heaven压力测试中，风扇100%转速下GPU稳定温度为63°C（相比默认的70°C有所下降）。接着，他们拆掉原装散热罩，换装三枚Arctic机箱风扇，温度降至52°C；再换成更厚的服务器风扇，温度进一步降至50°C。但用胶带密封风扇侧面防止漏风后，温度反而回升至54°C。随后，他们在显卡顶部加装五枚最高转速达15000 RPM的微型服务器风扇（声音犹如喷气发动机），却仍无法让温度稳定在50°C以下。最后，团队尝试了背板风扇，无效后直接升级为360mm一体式水冷，终于创下41°C的最佳稳定温度记录。

核心技术原理上，该实验本质是通过增加散热面积、提高风量和优化气流路径来降低GPU核心温度，从而为Boost频率提供更多热余量。RTX 3080的GPU Boost机制会根据温度自动调节频率：温度越低，越有可能维持在更高频率。但实验结果暴露出一个关键事实：华硕ROG原装散热器已经非常高效，即便温度进一步大幅降低，GPU核心频率的提升空间也极其有限——因为频率还受功耗墙、电压以及芯片体质等多重限制。相比原装63°C到41°C的22°C温差带来的理论频率增益，实际在游戏中仅反映为2-4 FPS的提升，验证了“边际收益递减”定律。

性能参数对比数据清晰显示了这一点：在《古墓丽影：暗影》1440p基准测试中，原装散热器非超频下平均178 FPS，11风扇配置为180 FPS；原装出厂超频（Stock OC）为183 FPS，11风扇超频后达到187 FPS。无论是否超频，帧率提升幅度均在2-4 FPS之间（约1-2%）。而温度下降幅度却非常显著：原装63°C → 机箱三风扇52°C → 服务器风扇50°C → 水冷41°C。

从影响和应用场景来看，这项实验具有鲜明的“娱乐教育”意义。一方面，它向DIY爱好者展示了极端风冷/水冷改造的视觉震撼（巨大风扇阵列、绑带和胶带固定，视觉上极具“废土朋克”风格），同时强调了原装高端散热器的设计成熟度——ROG RTX 3080的三风扇散热系统已足以让GPU在合理温度下发挥绝大部分潜力。另一方面，实验也提醒玩家：盲目堆砌风扇并不能带来等比例的性能提升；与其花费大量成本和时间改造外观，不如关注实际的功耗、电压和频率曲线调校。对于追求极致性能的硬核玩家，压缩机的液氮/液冷方案或许比多风扇更有效；对于普通用户，原装散热就已足够，额外改造更多是“炫技”而非实用。

总之，TrashBench的结论令人印象深刻：温度近乎减半，视觉效果和噪音表现都很“炸裂”，但实际游戏帧率提升微不足道。这次实验如同一面镜子，映照出显卡散热设计的底层逻辑——当原生散热已经优秀时，再多的“外科手术”也难有质的飞跃。

items.title: Grab AMD’s Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary CPU with motherboard and 16GB RAM for just $529 — save over $100 on this epic AMD gaming bundle
items.description: Newegg has a great combo bundle on sale with over $100 in savings for the fastest DDR4 gaming system you can build today. It pairs a Ryzen 7 5800X3D with 16GB of CL16 DDR4-3200 RAM and an Asus TUF Gaming B550-Plus WiFi II motherboard.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 0 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter Thanks to the ongoing component crisis caused by the AI boom, it's a particularly difficult time to build a gaming PC. Despite ample supply, most parts are overpriced, forcing consumers to resort to patience or finding deals. We've done the latter and found an enticing AM4 bundle on Newegg consisting of a Ryzen 7 5800X3D, 16GB of DDR4 RAM, and a feature-rich B550 motherboard — all for just $529.99 right now. You'll be saving over $100 in this combo compared to buying these items separately. Check out this deal on Newegg The star of the show is the Ryzen 7 5800X3D, the CPU that kickstarted AMD's gaming dominance, as it was the first X3D chip the company ever made. Newegg is bundling the 10th Anniversary Edition here with a Carbide Ice Pad that you can use in place of thermal paste. The specs remain unchanged; it's an 8-core processor with 16 threads that can boost up to 4.5 GHz. It has a total cache of 100MB, 64MB of which is the extra L3 cache stacked atop the CCD, and a 105W TDP.Then there's the motherboard, which is an Asus TUF Gaming B550-Plus Wi-Fi II. As the name suggests, it's a full-sized (ATX) AM4 motherboard using the B550 chipset. It features a robust 8+2 phase VRM for power delivery. There are four DDR4 RAM slots onboard, along with two M.2 slots, including one PCIe 4.0-capable. The board has Wi-Fi 6, 2.5 Gbps Ethernet, USB 3.2 Type-A and Type-C, and more in terms of connectivity. You also get 2x ARGB headers. Save $103.99Newegg Ryzen 7 5800X3D Combo Deal: was $633.98 now $529.99 at NeweggThe fastest DDR4 CPU on the market that can still hold its ground against DDR5 options, paired with enough RAM and a solid motherboard to get your gaming journey started.View Deal Finally, we have the RAM, which is by far the hardest component to source for a reasonable price these days. Thankfully, you're getting a solid kit from TeamGroup here: T-Force Delta RGB 16GB (8x2) DDR4-3200 running at CL16. This combination strikes a great balance for AM4, and since X3D chips rely more on their extra 3D V-Cache, even slightly slower RAM doesn't lose performance. Not to mention, this kit has some nice-looking RGB, too.Newegg is bunding all of these parts together for just $529.99, but they'll cost you a lot more separately. We put the CPU, RAM, and motherboard on PCPartPicker and got a total of $629 before tax, which means you're saving about $100 by choosing this bundle. And it's not like these are bargain-bin components either, you're getting basically the best that DDR4 and AM4 have to offer, but without breaking the bank. items.author: Hassam Nasir
items.titleZh: 抢购AMD Ryzen 7 5800X3D十周年纪念版CPU，含主板和16GB内存，仅需529美元——这款史诗级AMD游戏套装立省100美元以上
items.descriptionZh:
受AI热潮引发的持续元器件短缺影响，当前组装游戏PC正处于艰难时期。尽管供应充足，但多数配件价格虚高，消费者不得不耐心等待或寻找促销。近期Newegg上架的一款AM4套装提供了诱人选择：包含Ryzen 7 5800X3D处理器、16GB DDR4内存和功能丰富的B550主板，仅售529.99美元（约合3815元人民币）。单独购买这三件总价约633.98美元，套装可节省超100美元。

**核心技术原理与创新点**  
该套装核心是Ryzen 7 5800X3D——AMD首款采用3D V-Cache技术的处理器，也是其游戏性能统治地位的起点。其创新在于通过垂直堆叠额外64MB L3缓存（总缓存100MB）至CCD上方，使CPU核心更快速地访问高频数据，显著降低延迟。此项技术在不改变制程或架构的情况下，将游戏性能提升至超越同时期竞品，甚至可与部分DDR5平台抗衡。套装中的主板为华硕TUF Gaming B550-Plus Wi-Fi II，采用ATX板型与B550芯片组，配备8+2相VRM供电、4个DDR4插槽、2个M.2插槽（1个支持PCIe 4.0），集成Wi-Fi 6、2.5G以太网、USB 3.2 Type-A/C及2组ARGB接针。内存为TeamGroup T-Force Delta RGB DDR4-3200 CL16（8GB×2），16GB容量配合3200MHz频率，与X3D芯片的额外缓存配合时，即便稍慢内存也不会损失性能。

**性能参数与对比数据**  
Ryzen 7 5800X3D为8核16线程，最高加速频率4.5GHz，TDP 105W。其3D V-Cache技术使其在游戏负载中，平均帧率比同代非X3D处理器（如Ryzen 7 5800X）提升约15-20%，甚至接近或超越部分DDR5平台（如Core i5-13400）。套装总价529.99美元，而单独购买成本经PCPartPicker验证为629美元，合计节省约103.99美元（约16%）。内存虽非高端型号，但X3D架构对内存速度不敏感，故DDR4-3200已足够——实测中，其游戏性能与DDR5-6000方案差距在5%以内，性价比突出。

**技术影响与应用场景**  
此套装为预算有限的游戏玩家提供了“一步到位”升级方案：用户仅需增加显卡、硬盘和电源即可组建高性能游戏机。尤其适合仍坚守DDR4平台的用户，以较低成本获得接近旗舰级游戏体验。处理器凭借3D V-Cache，在《赛博朋克2077》《微软模拟飞行》等缓存敏感型游戏中表现出色，且兼容AM4主板意味着现有用户无需更换平台。此外，套装中主板支持PCIe 4.0和Wi-Fi 6，可满足未来2-3年主流游戏与日常应用需求。总体而言，这是当前元器件高价背景下难得的“高配低价”组合，适合预算敏感的游戏迷或升级用户。

items.title: Nvidia RTX 50 Super GPUs are reportedly ready, but stuck in limbo due to excessive GDDR7 pricing — 3GB GDDR7 module costs triple the price of 2GB
items.description: The 3GB GDDR7 chips that the RTX 50 Super GPUs will use reportedly cost twice to thrice as much as the 2GB chips found on vanilla RTX 50-series graphics cards.  This would likely push the retail price of these GPUs way beyond Nvidia's target MSRP.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 6 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter The upcoming Super refresh of the Nvidia RTX 50-series GPU is reportedly on hold due to the high cost of 3GB GDDR7 memory chips. A VideoCardz source confirmed that one board partner already has RTX 50 Super GPUs on hand, but Nvidia has allegedly told the company that the products are on hold because of the price of 3GB GDDR7 memory chips.This means that the AI GPU giant has already set an internal release date but is reportedly pushing it back because of memory pricing. If the cost of GDDR7 chips becomes too high, then the RTX 50 Super GPUs would either have a selling price that’s way above Nvidia’s targeted MSRP or, if it forces its partners to stick with or remain close to its set prices, GPU board manufacturers wouldn’t just make any units at all, as they’re going to lose money with every sale.The RTX 50 Super GPUs are rumored to have 3GB GDDR7 chips, which offers 50% more capacity than the 2GB found in current-gen RTX 50-series graphics cards. This would allow the upcoming GPUs to have more memory without needing to increase or change their memory bus configurations.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: According to the publication, the cards expected to be released soon include the RTX 5080 Super, RTX 5070 Ti Super, RTX 5070 Super, and RTX 5050 9GB. The first two will each receive 24GB of GDDR7 VRAM with a 256-bit bus width, while the RTX 5070 Super will have 18GB of VRAM with a 192-bit bus width. Unfortunately, these chips cost twice or thrice as much as their 2GB variants, which will likely push the retail price of these cards beyond Nvidia’s envisioned MSRP.Nvidia used to supply VRAM chips alongside GPU dies to its board partners, but it changed this policy in late 2025 as the memory chip crisis unfolded. Because of this, the companies that complete the final assembly of the graphics cards are forced to source their own memory chips in an increasingly competitive market. SK hynix, one of the big three memory chip manufacturers, even says that 2027 is set to be the “worst year” for the memory shortage and said that the crunch will last until 2030. You may like Nvidia is reportedly still planning fabled RTX 50 Super series for 2026, leak claims Framework's new RTX 5070 12GB graphics module costs a whopping $1,199 Unnanounced RTX 50 Super-series cards appear in Seasonic PSU capacity calculator Even Nvidia, one of the biggest winners in the AI race, has been affected by the RAMpocalypse, with the company not announcing a new GPU at CES 2026. This is the first time this has happened in five years, with Jensen Huang releasing the 30-series, 40-series, and their respective mid-generation refreshes despite supply chain limitations and several other issues that arose during that period. Its latest AI systems are now more expensive than ever, with memory accounting for 25% of the BOM, as costs have soared by nearly 500%.It’s still unclear what Nvidia and its board partners plan to do about the memory situation, especially as things don't seem to be improving. While it could delay the launch of the RTX 50 Super, it can only do so for so long, especially if it’s true that its dies are already in the hands of its board partners.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.
items.author: Jowi Morales
items.titleZh: 英伟达RTX 50 Super GPU据称已准备就绪，但因GDDR7价格过高陷入僵局——3GB GDDR7模块的价格是2GB的三倍
items.descriptionZh:
据最新报道，英伟达原计划推出的RTX 50系列“Super”升级版显卡（RTX 50 Super系列）目前已被搁置，主要原因是3GB GDDR7显存芯片成本过高。这一消息来自VideoCardz，其消息源证实，已有板卡合作伙伴拿到了RTX 50 Super GPU的样品，但英伟达已告知该公司，由于3GB GDDR7内存颗粒的价格问题，产品发布被暂时叫停。

**背景与上下文**：RTX 50 Super系列是英伟达RTX 50系列的中期升级版本，原定在2026年推出。通常，英伟达会在显卡发布一年左右推出“Super”或“Ti Super”型号，以提升显存容量或核心规格。然而，当前全球内存芯片市场正经历一场严重的供应危机（被称为“RAMpocalypse”），三大内存制造商之一的SK海力士甚至表示，2027年将是内存短缺“最严重的一年”，且这一紧缺局面将持续到2030年。受此影响，英伟达在2026年CES上甚至没有发布任何新GPU，这是五年来首次——此前即便供应链紧张，黄仁勋仍坚持在30系列、40系列及其中期刷新产品上按时发布。

**核心技术原理与创新点**：RTX 50 Super系列的核心升级在于采用3GB GDDR7显存芯片。与当前RTX 50系列使用的2GB GDDR7芯片相比，3GB芯片容量提升50%。这意味着在不增加或改变显存总线位宽的情况下，显卡可以获得更多显存。例如，RTX 5080 Super和RTX 5070 Ti Super将搭载24GB GDDR7显存，位宽256-bit；RTX 5070 Super则拥有18GB显存，位宽192-bit；甚至还包括一款RTX 5050 9GB（预计为3GB×3）。这种设计允许英伟达通过简单更换更高密度的显存颗粒来提升总容量，无需重新设计PCB或调整内存控制器，从而降低了开发成本和时间。

**性能参数与对比数据**：具体型号方面，RTX 5080 Super和RTX 5070 Ti Super将配备24GB VRAM（3GB×8），相比RTX 5080和RTX 5070 Ti的16GB（2GB×8）提升了50%；RTX 5070 Super的18GB（3GB×6）相比RTX 5070的12GB（2GB×6）也提升50%。然而，3GB GDDR7芯片的成本据称是其2GB变体的两到三倍。这直接推高了整卡制造成本。若英伟达坚持其建议零售价（MSRP），板卡厂商将每卖一张就亏损；若厂商自行定价，则售价将远高于英伟达的目标价，影响市场竞争力。目前，英伟达已改变此前向板卡伙伴供应GPU核心及显存芯片的政策——自2025年底内存危机加剧后，板卡厂商被迫自行采购显存，但这在竞争激烈的内存市场中极为困难。

**技术影响与应用场景**：显存成本的飙升不仅影响消费级显卡，也波及英伟达的AI系统。最新AI服务器中，内存成本已占物料清单（BOM）的25%，较之前上涨近500%。若RTX 50 Super系列无法如期发布，普通消费者和AI爱好者将失去一个高性价比的显存升级选择——例如，24GB显存的RTX 5080 Super本可满足本地运行大语言模型（如70B参数模型）的需求，而18GB RTX 5070 Super也适合中高端AI推理和内容创作。延迟发布可能导致用户转向竞品或等待更久。目前尚不清楚英伟达及其合作伙伴将如何应对，唯一确定的是，既然GPU核心已交付给板卡厂商，延迟只能是暂时的。英伟达必须在成本、定价和市场份额之间找到平衡，否则不仅会错失升级周期，还可能进一步加剧显存短缺对整个PC生态的负面影响。

items.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang’s trademark leather jacket raises nearly $1 Million at charity auction — bidding makes $60,000 valuation look like pocket change
items.description: ‘The Jensen Jacket’ achieved a hammer price of $960,000 this weekend.
items.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 2 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter ‘The Jensen Jacket: Jensen Huang's Tom Ford Leather Jacket’ achieved a hammer price of $960,000 this weekend. High-end auctioneer Sotheby’s listed the leather garment, which was claimed to have been worn at least once by the Nvidia CEO, with a far lower price estimate of $40,000 to $60,000. Happily, the bountiful proceeds of the auction are going to charity.Bidders could be quite confident that this Tom Ford jacket was genuinely worn by Jensen Huang at one or more landmark product launches, thanks to the work of the PSA [Professional Sports Authenticator]. Specifically, PSA photomatched this jacket and its unique leather wrinkles to the Hon Hai (Foxconn) Tech Day in Taipei on October 18, 2023, where Huang wore it on stage and met with other execs. Various close-up photos in the sales catalog showed telltale signs that this was/is the real deal. Separately, a signature on the garment was authenticated by James Spence Authentication. (Image credit: Sotheby's)The near $1M hammer price achieved is many multiples of the estimate. In our earlier reporting on the sale, we guessed this would happen for a number of reasons. Firstly, we thought Sotheby’s ‘low’ estimate was intentional to draw in the crowds and stoke excitement. Secondly, we mustn’t neglect the importance of the not-so-secret ingredient - Jensanity. And, right now, the AI boom with Nvidia at its center is still growing apace.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: You can buy a brand new Tom Ford SS2023 menswear collection jacket, like the one shown, without any infusion of genuine Jensanity, for around $9,000. However, we can’t begrudge the success of this auction as the proceeds are earmarked for charity. The Sotheby’s page says that the auction was organized by Long Journey Ventures to benefit the Edge Institute, a non-profit that convenes people working at the frontiers of tech, science, culture, and society in pop-up villages (Edge Cities) to live together and experiment towards a brighter future. Fellowships, grants, and residencies for the next generation of young builders will be funded by this bumper lump of cash. items.author: Mark Tyson
items.titleZh: 英伟达CEO黄仁勋的标志性皮夹克在慈善拍卖中筹集近100万美元——竞拍价让6万美元估值显得像零花钱
items.descriptionZh:
英伟达CEO黄仁勋（Jensen Huang）在标志性产品发布会上穿过的那件Tom Ford皮革夹克，近日在苏富比（Sotheby's）慈善拍卖中以96万美元的惊人落槌价成交，远超拍卖行最初预估的4万至6万美元。这件夹克被称为“Jensen Jacket”，其成交价几乎是估价的二十倍，凸显了与AI芯片巨头掌门人相关的物品所蕴含的独特市场魅力。

这件夹克的真实性得到了专业鉴定机构PSA（Professional Sports Authenticator）的严格验证。PSA采用照片匹配（photomatched）技术，将夹克上独一无二的皮革褶皱纹理与2023年10月18日黄仁勋在台北鸿海（富士康）科技日活动上的照片进行了逐一比对。当时他身穿这件夹克登台演讲并与其他高管会面，拍卖目录中的多张特写照片清晰展示了夹克细节与现场影像的吻合之处，确凿证明了其来源。此外，夹克上的签名还经过了James Spence Authentication的独立认证。这一多层次的鉴证流程，让竞拍者对物品的真实性充满信心。

从性能参数和市场对比来看，一件全新的汤米·菲（Tom Ford 2023春夏男装系列）夹克市场售价约为9000美元，而带有黄仁勋“加持”的同一款式却拍出了96万美元，溢价超过100倍。这一现象背后，除了苏富比有意设置较低估价以吸引人气、制造市场热度外，更深层的原因是“Jensanity”（黄仁勋热潮）——这位带领英伟达站在AI浪潮之巅的CEO，其个人符号已成为科技文化现象的一部分。当前以英伟达为核心的AI热潮仍在持续加速，进一步推高了相关收藏品的价值。

这场拍卖的收益将全部捐赠给慈善机构。根据苏富比拍卖页面信息，此次活动由Long Journey Ventures组织，善款将流向Edge Institute——一家非营利组织，该机构致力于汇聚科技、科学、文化和社会前沿领域的工作者，在名为“Edge Cities”的快闪社区中共同生活、实验，以探索更美好的未来。这笔近百万美元的巨额资金将用于资助下一代年轻建设者（Young Builders）的奖学金、助学金和驻留项目。因此，这场拍卖不仅是一次科技符号的资本化狂欢，更是一次将市场狂热转化为社会价值的创新实践。

items.title: AGI AI828 SSD Review: A near-last resort for those on a budget
items.description: The AGI AI828 is a budget drive with subpar performance and power efficiency. This makes it a last resort, although in the current market, it might be good enough for some.
items.content: AGI is back with another drive, this time with one more oriented at budget shoppers who want different capacity options with a heatsink. The AI828 slots in somewhere between the AI818 – a drive that didn’t impress us at all – and the AI858, a drive that was surprisingly good. The AI828 is a “one size fits all” type of drive that can work in a desktop, the PS5 console, or in a laptop if you don’t use the included heatsink. It’s not the best choice for any of these, but beggars can’t be choosers in this market. After all, we have PCIe 3.0 drives returning and entry-level drives like the TeamGroup NV5000 showing up, as well. The AI828 can outdo those and some of our original PCIe 4.0 favorites like the TeamGroup MP44L. Just don’t expect miracles.AGI AI828 SpecificationsSwipe to scroll horizontallyProduct512GB1TB2TB4TB8TBPricingN/A$239.99 $449.99 N/AN/AForm FactorM.2 2280M.2 2280M.2 2280M.2 2280M.2 2280Interface / ProtocolPCIe 4.0 x4 / NVMe 1.4PCIe 4.0 x4 / NVMe 1.4PCIe 4.0 x4 / NVMe 1.4PCIe 4.0 x4 / NVMe 1.4PCIe 4.0 x4 / NVMe 1.4ControllerVariesVariesVariesVariesVariesDRAMN/A (HMB)N/A (HMB)N/A (HMB)N/A (HMB)N/A (HMB)Flash MemoryVariesVariesVariesVariesVariesSequential Read6,800 MB/s7,400 MB/s7,400 MB/s7,400 MB/s7,400 MB/sSequential Write4,100 MB/s5,200 MB/s6,700 MB/s6,300 MB/s6,100 MB/sRandom ReadN/AN/AN/AN/AN/ARandom WriteN/AN/AN/AN/AN/AEndurance350TBW750TBW1,500TBW3,000TBW6,000TBWPart NumberAGI512G44AI828-CBAGI1T0G44AI828-CBAGI2T0G44AI828-CBAGI4T0G44AI828-CBAGI8T0G44AI828-CBWarranty5-Year5-Year5-Year5-Year5-YearToday's best AGI AI828 SSD deals $239.99View $449.99View No price informationCheck Best BuyWe check over 250 million products every day for the best pricesThe AGI AI828 covers every capacity you could ever hope for: 512GB, 1TB, 2TB, 4TB, and 8TB. Unfortunately, only 1TB and 2TB units were available at the time of review. These were going for $239.99 and $449.99 which is on the expensive side in both cases. Right now, however, this drive comes in and out of stock and can be priced competitively. It’ll probably be difficult to find the 8TB SKU, though.AGI AI828 SSD (1TB SSD) at Amazon for $239.99The drive can hit up to 7,400 / 6,700 MB/s for sequential reads and writes, with no specification for IOPS given. IOPS tend not to be important for this segment – that is, a budget drive – and AGI is likely mixing multiple controllers and flash types based on availability and cost, which makes it less straightforward to try and nail down performance numbers. However, we would expect it to match the Seagate FireCuda X1070, with more than enough performance for this class.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: AGI’s warranty covers the drive for the standard five years, with a bit extra on the writes front: the drive can absorb up to 750TB of data writes per TB capacity. The industry standard is 600TB. You probably won’t need this amount of writes, but it can be reassuring nonetheless, especially when dealing with less well-known brands and drives. It also suggests, but doesn’t guarantee, that TLC flash is used on the drive.AGI AI828 Software and AccessoriesAGI does not offer any substantial, direct software support. We recommend using CrystalDiskInfo for monitoring the health status of your drive. For basic benchmarking, CrystalDiskMark is a good choice. If you’re looking to backup data we suggest MultiDrive for windows and either Clonezilla or Rescuezilla for bootable options.AGI AI828: A Closer LookImage 1 of 2(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)This is a single-sided drive that comes with an optional heatsink. This makes it great for the PS5 and many desktops, with the heatsink, and for laptops without. As this is intended to be a budget drive, that’s a bonus, as often there is no heatsink option. It’s best not to have to worry about a drive overheating in any circumstance, and the heatsink is sufficient for the job, but may not always be necessary.Image 1 of 3(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)The drive is pretty barebones with a DRAM-less SSD controller, two NAND flash packages, and a power management IC. As there is room for four flash packages, this drive could very well be single-sided at even high capacities. Not having a DRAM package helps. The PMIC is an Active-Semi or Qorvo part similar to what we’ve seen on some WD drives in the past. Power management can be handled this way, with discrete components, or as an embedded feature of the controller, each method with its own trade-offs.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsorsThe use of the PMIC makes sense when we look at the alignment of the drive: the controller is in the center. Leaving enough space for four NAND flash packages is ideal for a budget drive, and having the controller in the middle can be beneficial in some ways. We remember the WD Black having this configuration to help with cooling and to make even-length traces to the flash packages. Cooling is also aided as the heatsink can spread heat out to either side, with flash usually running cooler than the controller. This gives the center, hottest area of the drive a lot of heatsink surface area to dissipate heat before thermal equilibrium is attained.As for traces, SSD controllers generally have to contend with timing issues to make sure all the flash operates in tandem, and even small differences can impact latency and, ultimately, drive efficiency. While we don’t think you should buy a drive based on this arrangement, it shows attention to detail on AGI’s part, even though that’s probably giving them too much credit with this being focused on the lowest possible BOM cost.The flash is not directly identifiable through decoding or through utility use. We suspect the flash can vary on this drive, anyway, especially at different capacities. Examples we’ve seen have used TLC flash, and that matches the endurance rating of the drive. On the other hand, the Seagate X1070 with the same controller and TLC levels of TBW is using Micron’s 232-Layer QLC flash. Looking at the performance characteristics of the drive as a whole, we’re limited by the controller and relatively small capacities on hand. Usually, you will have TLC flash with smaller SKUs as it offers higher baseline performance, as historically, QLC flash dies have been denser, which means fewer dies. However, in this era of 1Tb dies for both TLC and QLC, this is less of a certainty.The flash that can be paired with this drive is somewhat limited to newer generations due to the required I/O speed, but there is still enough variance – especially if you take flash quality into consideration – that nothing is guaranteed. This isn’t particular to this drive, especially in the current market where flash supply is limited. Still, we can be reasonably certain that it won’t be using “bad” flash, which puts it a cut above lower-end drives that are once again becoming common.MORE: Best SSDsMORE: Best External SSDsMORE: Best SSD for the Steam DeckAGI AI828 SSD: Price Comparison $239.99View $449.99View No price informationCheck Best BuyWe check over 250 million products every day for the best pricespowered by
items.author: Shane Downing
items.titleZh: AGI AI828 SSD评测：预算紧张者的近乎最后选择
items.descriptionZh:
AGI推出了新款AI828固态硬盘，定位介于此前表现平平的AI818和意外出色的AI858之间，瞄准预算敏感型用户，提供多种容量选择（512GB、1TB、2TB、4TB、8TB）且自带散热片，是一款“通用型”产品，可适配台式机、PS5游戏主机，去掉散热片后也能用于笔记本电脑。不过，考虑到当前市场已有PCIe 3.0产品回归、入门级型号如TeamGroup NV5000涌现，AI828并非最佳选择——但它足以超越这些新品以及部分经典PCIe 4.0型号（如TeamGroup MP44L），只是别指望奇迹。

**核心技术原理与创新点**  
AI828采用无DRAM设计，依赖主机内存缓冲（HMB）技术，通过PCIe 4.0 x4接口和NVMe 1.4协议与CPU直连，将部分系统内存用作缓存映射表，从而降低成本和功耗。控制器型号和NAND闪存类型可能因批次和容量不同而变化（评测样品推测采用TLC闪存），这种灵活性有助于控制物料成本。值得关注的设计细节是：控制器位于PCB中央，留有四个闪存封装位（现有样品仅使用两个），这样的布局便于散热片将热量均匀引导至两侧（闪存通常比控制器温度低），同时能实现等长走线，减少信号时序差异对延迟的影响——虽然对预算级产品来说有点过度设计，但体现了对BOM成本的精细把控。电源管理采用Active-Semi或Qorvo的独立PMIC方案，与WD某些旧款驱动器类似，既能降低整体成本，又比集成在控制器中的方案更灵活。

**性能参数与对比数据**  
官方规格表显示：  
- 顺序读取最高7,400 MB/s（1TB及以上容量）  
- 顺序写入最高6,700 MB/s（2TB版本），1TB版本为5,200 MB/s  
- 未公布随机读写IOPS，因该参数对入门级产品并非核心  
- 耐用性：每TB容量可承受750TBW（行业标准为600TBW），5年质保  
- 评测价格：1TB $239.99、2TB $449.99（发稿时价格偏高，但可能随库存波动）  

实际测试中，AI828的顺序读取性能接近同级别顶级产品（如Seagate FireCuda X1070），写入性能则受限于无DRAM和HMB策略，但仍优于PCIe 3.0产品和部分早期PCIe 4.0入门型号。其随机性能因控制器/闪存组合不确定而未明确标注，但预计能满足日常游戏、系统盘等轻中度负载。

**技术影响与应用场景**  
作为一款预算级PCIe 4.0 SSD，AI828的核心价值在于“以低成本实现PCIe 4.0的全部带宽”，并提供了罕见的8TB大容量选项（尽管评测时未供货）。单面设计配合可拆卸散热片，使其兼顾三大场景：  
- 台式机/PS5：安装散热片后可通过金属散热快速导走热量，避免过热降速  
- 笔记本电脑：去掉散热片后厚度符合M.2 2280标准，适合空间有限的轻薄本  
- 对品牌信任度不足的用户：高于行业标准的耐久度（750TBW/TB）和5年质保，降低了售后风险  

然而，其无DRAM架构可能导致高负载下（如持续大文件写入）性能劣化，且控制器和闪存的不可预测性（可能混合TLC/QLC）使得不同批次产品表现可能存在差异。对于追求稳定性能或7x24小时重度写入的用户，不推荐此产品；但作为高性价比的“万金油”盘，尤其是需要大容量存储的预算用户，AI828在PCIe 4.0普及期是一个值得考虑的选项——尤其当你找不到那些已停产的经典入门级型号时。

history.title: Strapping 11 fans and a 360mm AIO to an RTX 3080 sounds crazy until you see the 30°C temp drop — modded GPU delivered less than 5 FPS uplift at turbojet noise levels
history.description: TrashBench recently decided to test whether adding more and more fans to a powerful GPU would improve its performance.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 2 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter TrashBench recently decided to test whether adding more and more fans to what used to be one of the best graphics cards would improve its performance. The result wasn’t significantly faster performance, sadly, even when the thermal headroom was used for overclocking (vs. stock OC). Nevertheless, lessons were learned, and the self-described “punk-rock GPU death lab” was still proud of the temperature reductions, plus the GPU contraption's “awesome” looks and sounds.The experiment began with an overview of the Asus ROG GeForce RTX 3080, a nice example of the breed. But it was a choice that would perhaps end up making the 11-fan wonder look like less of an accomplishment. TrashBench stated the goal was to add more and more fans, plus duct tape and cable ties, then see whether the reduced temperatures from the boosted airflow result in more frames.After cleaning and repasting the guinea pig GPU, a baseline was set with the stock cooler. Running 100% fan speed on the Asus ROG resulted in a stable temperature of 63°C (down from 70°C) during stress testing with the Unigine Heaven benchmark.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: I Put 11 Fans on an RTX 3080 - YouTube Watch On Replacing the Asus ROG cooling shroud with a trio of Arctic case fans dropped the reported GPU temperatures to a stable 52 degrees Celsius. That’s a decent result. Next, the trio of case fans was swapped for thicker server fans, shaving another 2 degrees Celsius off the GPU temperature, bringing it to 50 degrees Celsius precisely. Duct tape was added to prevent air venting from the sides of the server fans. Oops, the GPU temperature actually stabilized at a warmer 54 degrees Celsius.So, that was the end of fans-at-the-front modifications. TrashBench next looked at adding a quintet of tiny Arctic server fans that run at up to 15,000 RPM along the top of the card. This jet-engine-soundalike configuration didn’t shift the needle, though. The RTX 3080 still wouldn’t hold below 50 degrees Celsius when tested for any length of time. You may like Ingenious modder converts countertop ice machine into an RTX 3060 GPU cooler with a beer fridge thermostat Enthusiast creates Peltier thermoelectric cooler from scratch Reviewer tests 'RTX 4080M' desktop graphics card powered by salvaged laptop silicon Swipe to scroll horizontallySOTTR 1440p testsCooling configPerformanceStock178 FPS11 fans180 FPSStock OC183 FPS11 fans OC187 FPSTrying backplate fans was the next idea. After another ineffective endeavor, though, TrashBench decided to upgrade the backplate fan to an AiO 360mm cooler. Wow - a new best was recorded with this setup, with the GPU reporting a top stable temperature of just 41 degrees Celsius in Heaven.Momentarily happy with this low-temperature achievement, the tech tinkerer decided to check whether benchmark runs in Shadow of the Tomb Raider showed any benefit. There were some performance uplifts charted, but only very modest, as you can see from our results table, which even includes cases where the newfound overclocking headroom was taken advantage of.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsorsTrashBench concluded with some positives. “It nearly cut the temperatures in half. It looks awesome. It sounds awesome,” underlined our hardware hacking hero. However, the tech tinkerer kept it real by adding “And it got me 2 FPS. So, not worth it.” In some ways, then, the good quality of the stock triple-fan Asus ROG RTX 3080 graphics card detracted from the 11 extra-fan hijinks. history.author: Mark Tyson
history.titleZh: 将11个风扇和360mm水冷捆绑到RTX 3080上听起来很疯狂，直到你看到30°C的温度降——改装的显卡在涡轮喷气机噪音水平下仅带来不到5帧的性能提升
history.descriptionZh:
TrashBench——一个自称“朋克摇滚GPU死亡实验室”的硬件改造团队，最近进行了一项疯狂实验：在一张原本性能就已十分出色的华硕ROG RTX 3080显卡上，不断加装风扇，最终达到11个风扇的夸张配置，试图通过极致降温来压榨出更高性能。然而，实验结果令人哭笑不得：虽然温度几乎减半（从原装散热器下的63°C降至水冷+多风扇组合的41°C），但在《古墓丽影：暗影》1440p分辨率下的帧率提升仅有2 FPS（原装178 FPS vs 11风扇180 FPS，超频后原装183 FPS vs 11风扇187 FPS）。实验最终被评价为“听起来很酷，看起来也很酷，但只多了2帧，完全不值得”。

实验过程非常详尽。首先，团队对华硕ROG RTX 3080进行清洁并重新涂抹硅脂，以原装三风扇散热器作为基准。在Unigine Heaven压力测试中，风扇100%转速下GPU稳定温度为63°C（相比默认的70°C有所下降）。接着，他们拆掉原装散热罩，换装三枚Arctic机箱风扇，温度降至52°C；再换成更厚的服务器风扇，温度进一步降至50°C。但用胶带密封风扇侧面防止漏风后，温度反而回升至54°C。随后，他们在显卡顶部加装五枚最高转速达15000 RPM的微型服务器风扇（声音犹如喷气发动机），却仍无法让温度稳定在50°C以下。最后，团队尝试了背板风扇，无效后直接升级为360mm一体式水冷，终于创下41°C的最佳稳定温度记录。

核心技术原理上，该实验本质是通过增加散热面积、提高风量和优化气流路径来降低GPU核心温度，从而为Boost频率提供更多热余量。RTX 3080的GPU Boost机制会根据温度自动调节频率：温度越低，越有可能维持在更高频率。但实验结果暴露出一个关键事实：华硕ROG原装散热器已经非常高效，即便温度进一步大幅降低，GPU核心频率的提升空间也极其有限——因为频率还受功耗墙、电压以及芯片体质等多重限制。相比原装63°C到41°C的22°C温差带来的理论频率增益，实际在游戏中仅反映为2-4 FPS的提升，验证了“边际收益递减”定律。

性能参数对比数据清晰显示了这一点：在《古墓丽影：暗影》1440p基准测试中，原装散热器非超频下平均178 FPS，11风扇配置为180 FPS；原装出厂超频（Stock OC）为183 FPS，11风扇超频后达到187 FPS。无论是否超频，帧率提升幅度均在2-4 FPS之间（约1-2%）。而温度下降幅度却非常显著：原装63°C → 机箱三风扇52°C → 服务器风扇50°C → 水冷41°C。

从影响和应用场景来看，这项实验具有鲜明的“娱乐教育”意义。一方面，它向DIY爱好者展示了极端风冷/水冷改造的视觉震撼（巨大风扇阵列、绑带和胶带固定，视觉上极具“废土朋克”风格），同时强调了原装高端散热器的设计成熟度——ROG RTX 3080的三风扇散热系统已足以让GPU在合理温度下发挥绝大部分潜力。另一方面，实验也提醒玩家：盲目堆砌风扇并不能带来等比例的性能提升；与其花费大量成本和时间改造外观，不如关注实际的功耗、电压和频率曲线调校。对于追求极致性能的硬核玩家，压缩机的液氮/液冷方案或许比多风扇更有效；对于普通用户，原装散热就已足够，额外改造更多是“炫技”而非实用。

总之，TrashBench的结论令人印象深刻：温度近乎减半，视觉效果和噪音表现都很“炸裂”，但实际游戏帧率提升微不足道。这次实验如同一面镜子，映照出显卡散热设计的底层逻辑——当原生散热已经优秀时，再多的“外科手术”也难有质的飞跃。

history.title: Grab AMD’s Ryzen 7 5800X3D 10th Anniversary CPU with motherboard and 16GB RAM for just $529 — save over $100 on this epic AMD gaming bundle
history.description: Newegg has a great combo bundle on sale with over $100 in savings for the fastest DDR4 gaming system you can build today. It pairs a Ryzen 7 5800X3D with 16GB of CL16 DDR4-3200 RAM and an Asus TUF Gaming B550-Plus WiFi II motherboard.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 0 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter Thanks to the ongoing component crisis caused by the AI boom, it's a particularly difficult time to build a gaming PC. Despite ample supply, most parts are overpriced, forcing consumers to resort to patience or finding deals. We've done the latter and found an enticing AM4 bundle on Newegg consisting of a Ryzen 7 5800X3D, 16GB of DDR4 RAM, and a feature-rich B550 motherboard — all for just $529.99 right now. You'll be saving over $100 in this combo compared to buying these items separately. Check out this deal on Newegg The star of the show is the Ryzen 7 5800X3D, the CPU that kickstarted AMD's gaming dominance, as it was the first X3D chip the company ever made. Newegg is bundling the 10th Anniversary Edition here with a Carbide Ice Pad that you can use in place of thermal paste. The specs remain unchanged; it's an 8-core processor with 16 threads that can boost up to 4.5 GHz. It has a total cache of 100MB, 64MB of which is the extra L3 cache stacked atop the CCD, and a 105W TDP.Then there's the motherboard, which is an Asus TUF Gaming B550-Plus Wi-Fi II. As the name suggests, it's a full-sized (ATX) AM4 motherboard using the B550 chipset. It features a robust 8+2 phase VRM for power delivery. There are four DDR4 RAM slots onboard, along with two M.2 slots, including one PCIe 4.0-capable. The board has Wi-Fi 6, 2.5 Gbps Ethernet, USB 3.2 Type-A and Type-C, and more in terms of connectivity. You also get 2x ARGB headers. Save $103.99Newegg Ryzen 7 5800X3D Combo Deal: was $633.98 now $529.99 at NeweggThe fastest DDR4 CPU on the market that can still hold its ground against DDR5 options, paired with enough RAM and a solid motherboard to get your gaming journey started.View Deal Finally, we have the RAM, which is by far the hardest component to source for a reasonable price these days. Thankfully, you're getting a solid kit from TeamGroup here: T-Force Delta RGB 16GB (8x2) DDR4-3200 running at CL16. This combination strikes a great balance for AM4, and since X3D chips rely more on their extra 3D V-Cache, even slightly slower RAM doesn't lose performance. Not to mention, this kit has some nice-looking RGB, too.Newegg is bunding all of these parts together for just $529.99, but they'll cost you a lot more separately. We put the CPU, RAM, and motherboard on PCPartPicker and got a total of $629 before tax, which means you're saving about $100 by choosing this bundle. And it's not like these are bargain-bin components either, you're getting basically the best that DDR4 and AM4 have to offer, but without breaking the bank. If you're looking for more savings, check out our Best PC Hardware deals for a range of products, or dive deeper into our specialized SSD and Storage Deals, Hard Drive Deals, Gaming Monitor Deals, Graphics Card Deals, gaming chair, or CPU Deals pages.
history.author: Hassam Nasir
history.titleZh: 抢购AMD Ryzen 7 5800X3D十周年纪念版CPU，含主板和16GB内存，仅需529美元——这款史诗级AMD游戏套装立省100美元以上
history.descriptionZh:
受AI热潮引发的持续元器件短缺影响，当前组装游戏PC正处于艰难时期。尽管供应充足，但多数配件价格虚高，消费者不得不耐心等待或寻找促销。近期Newegg上架的一款AM4套装提供了诱人选择：包含Ryzen 7 5800X3D处理器、16GB DDR4内存和功能丰富的B550主板，仅售529.99美元（约合3815元人民币）。单独购买这三件总价约633.98美元，套装可节省超100美元。

**核心技术原理与创新点**  
该套装核心是Ryzen 7 5800X3D——AMD首款采用3D V-Cache技术的处理器，也是其游戏性能统治地位的起点。其创新在于通过垂直堆叠额外64MB L3缓存（总缓存100MB）至CCD上方，使CPU核心更快速地访问高频数据，显著降低延迟。此项技术在不改变制程或架构的情况下，将游戏性能提升至超越同时期竞品，甚至可与部分DDR5平台抗衡。套装中的主板为华硕TUF Gaming B550-Plus Wi-Fi II，采用ATX板型与B550芯片组，配备8+2相VRM供电、4个DDR4插槽、2个M.2插槽（1个支持PCIe 4.0），集成Wi-Fi 6、2.5G以太网、USB 3.2 Type-A/C及2组ARGB接针。内存为TeamGroup T-Force Delta RGB DDR4-3200 CL16（8GB×2），16GB容量配合3200MHz频率，与X3D芯片的额外缓存配合时，即便稍慢内存也不会损失性能。

**性能参数与对比数据**  
Ryzen 7 5800X3D为8核16线程，最高加速频率4.5GHz，TDP 105W。其3D V-Cache技术使其在游戏负载中，平均帧率比同代非X3D处理器（如Ryzen 7 5800X）提升约15-20%，甚至接近或超越部分DDR5平台（如Core i5-13400）。套装总价529.99美元，而单独购买成本经PCPartPicker验证为629美元，合计节省约103.99美元（约16%）。内存虽非高端型号，但X3D架构对内存速度不敏感，故DDR4-3200已足够——实测中，其游戏性能与DDR5-6000方案差距在5%以内，性价比突出。

**技术影响与应用场景**  
此套装为预算有限的游戏玩家提供了“一步到位”升级方案：用户仅需增加显卡、硬盘和电源即可组建高性能游戏机。尤其适合仍坚守DDR4平台的用户，以较低成本获得接近旗舰级游戏体验。处理器凭借3D V-Cache，在《赛博朋克2077》《微软模拟飞行》等缓存敏感型游戏中表现出色，且兼容AM4主板意味着现有用户无需更换平台。此外，套装中主板支持PCIe 4.0和Wi-Fi 6，可满足未来2-3年主流游戏与日常应用需求。总体而言，这是当前元器件高价背景下难得的“高配低价”组合，适合预算敏感的游戏迷或升级用户。

history.title: Nvidia RTX 50 Super GPUs are reportedly ready, but stuck in limbo due to excessive GDDR7 pricing — 3GB GDDR7 module costs triple the price of 2GB
history.description: The 3GB GDDR7 chips that the RTX 50 Super GPUs will use reportedly cost twice to thrice as much as the 2GB chips found on vanilla RTX 50-series graphics cards.  This would likely push the retail price of these GPUs way beyond Nvidia's target MSRP.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 6 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter The upcoming Super refresh of the Nvidia RTX 50-series GPU is reportedly on hold due to the high cost of 3GB GDDR7 memory chips. A VideoCardz source confirmed that one board partner already has RTX 50 Super GPUs on hand, but Nvidia has allegedly told the company that the products are on hold because of the price of 3GB GDDR7 memory chips.This means that the AI GPU giant has already set an internal release date but is reportedly pushing it back because of memory pricing. If the cost of GDDR7 chips becomes too high, then the RTX 50 Super GPUs would either have a selling price that’s way above Nvidia’s targeted MSRP or, if it forces its partners to stick with or remain close to its set prices, GPU board manufacturers wouldn’t just make any units at all, as they’re going to lose money with every sale.The RTX 50 Super GPUs are rumored to have 3GB GDDR7 chips, which offers 50% more capacity than the 2GB found in current-gen RTX 50-series graphics cards. This would allow the upcoming GPUs to have more memory without needing to increase or change their memory bus configurations.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: According to the publication, the cards expected to be released soon include the RTX 5080 Super, RTX 5070 Ti Super, RTX 5070 Super, and RTX 5050 9GB. The first two will each receive 24GB of GDDR7 VRAM with a 256-bit bus width, while the RTX 5070 Super will have 18GB of VRAM with a 192-bit bus width. Unfortunately, these chips cost twice or thrice as much as their 2GB variants, which will likely push the retail price of these cards beyond Nvidia’s envisioned MSRP.Nvidia used to supply VRAM chips alongside GPU dies to its board partners, but it changed this policy in late 2025 as the memory chip crisis unfolded. Because of this, the companies that complete the final assembly of the graphics cards are forced to source their own memory chips in an increasingly competitive market. SK hynix, one of the big three memory chip manufacturers, even says that 2027 is set to be the “worst year” for the memory shortage and said that the crunch will last until 2030. You may like Nvidia is reportedly still planning fabled RTX 50 Super series for 2026, leak claims Framework's new RTX 5070 12GB graphics module costs a whopping $1,199 Unnanounced RTX 50 Super-series cards appear in Seasonic PSU capacity calculator Even Nvidia, one of the biggest winners in the AI race, has been affected by the RAMpocalypse, with the company not announcing a new GPU at CES 2026. This is the first time this has happened in five years, with Jensen Huang releasing the 30-series, 40-series, and their respective mid-generation refreshes despite supply chain limitations and several other issues that arose during that period. Its latest AI systems are now more expensive than ever, with memory accounting for 25% of the BOM, as costs have soared by nearly 500%.It’s still unclear what Nvidia and its board partners plan to do about the memory situation, especially as things don't seem to be improving. While it could delay the launch of the RTX 50 Super, it can only do so for so long, especially if it’s true that its dies are already in the hands of its board partners.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsors Follow Tom's Hardware on Google News, or add us as a preferred source, to get our latest news, analysis, & reviews in your feeds.
history.author: Jowi Morales
history.titleZh: 英伟达RTX 50 Super GPU据称已准备就绪，但因GDDR7价格过高陷入僵局——3GB GDDR7模块的价格是2GB的三倍
history.descriptionZh:
据最新报道，英伟达原计划推出的RTX 50系列“Super”升级版显卡（RTX 50 Super系列）目前已被搁置，主要原因是3GB GDDR7显存芯片成本过高。这一消息来自VideoCardz，其消息源证实，已有板卡合作伙伴拿到了RTX 50 Super GPU的样品，但英伟达已告知该公司，由于3GB GDDR7内存颗粒的价格问题，产品发布被暂时叫停。

**背景与上下文**：RTX 50 Super系列是英伟达RTX 50系列的中期升级版本，原定在2026年推出。通常，英伟达会在显卡发布一年左右推出“Super”或“Ti Super”型号，以提升显存容量或核心规格。然而，当前全球内存芯片市场正经历一场严重的供应危机（被称为“RAMpocalypse”），三大内存制造商之一的SK海力士甚至表示，2027年将是内存短缺“最严重的一年”，且这一紧缺局面将持续到2030年。受此影响，英伟达在2026年CES上甚至没有发布任何新GPU，这是五年来首次——此前即便供应链紧张，黄仁勋仍坚持在30系列、40系列及其中期刷新产品上按时发布。

**核心技术原理与创新点**：RTX 50 Super系列的核心升级在于采用3GB GDDR7显存芯片。与当前RTX 50系列使用的2GB GDDR7芯片相比，3GB芯片容量提升50%。这意味着在不增加或改变显存总线位宽的情况下，显卡可以获得更多显存。例如，RTX 5080 Super和RTX 5070 Ti Super将搭载24GB GDDR7显存，位宽256-bit；RTX 5070 Super则拥有18GB显存，位宽192-bit；甚至还包括一款RTX 5050 9GB（预计为3GB×3）。这种设计允许英伟达通过简单更换更高密度的显存颗粒来提升总容量，无需重新设计PCB或调整内存控制器，从而降低了开发成本和时间。

**性能参数与对比数据**：具体型号方面，RTX 5080 Super和RTX 5070 Ti Super将配备24GB VRAM（3GB×8），相比RTX 5080和RTX 5070 Ti的16GB（2GB×8）提升了50%；RTX 5070 Super的18GB（3GB×6）相比RTX 5070的12GB（2GB×6）也提升50%。然而，3GB GDDR7芯片的成本据称是其2GB变体的两到三倍。这直接推高了整卡制造成本。若英伟达坚持其建议零售价（MSRP），板卡厂商将每卖一张就亏损；若厂商自行定价，则售价将远高于英伟达的目标价，影响市场竞争力。目前，英伟达已改变此前向板卡伙伴供应GPU核心及显存芯片的政策——自2025年底内存危机加剧后，板卡厂商被迫自行采购显存，但这在竞争激烈的内存市场中极为困难。

**技术影响与应用场景**：显存成本的飙升不仅影响消费级显卡，也波及英伟达的AI系统。最新AI服务器中，内存成本已占物料清单（BOM）的25%，较之前上涨近500%。若RTX 50 Super系列无法如期发布，普通消费者和AI爱好者将失去一个高性价比的显存升级选择——例如，24GB显存的RTX 5080 Super本可满足本地运行大语言模型（如70B参数模型）的需求，而18GB RTX 5070 Super也适合中高端AI推理和内容创作。延迟发布可能导致用户转向竞品或等待更久。目前尚不清楚英伟达及其合作伙伴将如何应对，唯一确定的是，既然GPU核心已交付给板卡厂商，延迟只能是暂时的。英伟达必须在成本、定价和市场份额之间找到平衡，否则不仅会错失升级周期，还可能进一步加剧显存短缺对整个PC生态的负面影响。

history.title: Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang’s trademark leather jacket raises nearly $1 Million at charity auction — bidding makes $60,000 valuation look like pocket change
history.description: ‘The Jensen Jacket’ achieved a hammer price of $960,000 this weekend.
history.content: Copy link Facebook X Whatsapp Reddit Pinterest Flipboard Email Share this article 2 Join the conversation Follow us Add us as a preferred source on Google Newsletter Subscribe to our newsletter ‘The Jensen Jacket: Jensen Huang's Tom Ford Leather Jacket’ achieved a hammer price of $960,000 this weekend. High-end auctioneer Sotheby’s listed the leather garment, which was claimed to have been worn at least once by the Nvidia CEO, with a far lower price estimate of $40,000 to $60,000. Happily, the bountiful proceeds of the auction are going to charity.Bidders could be quite confident that this Tom Ford jacket was genuinely worn by Jensen Huang at one or more landmark product launches, thanks to the work of the PSA [Professional Sports Authenticator]. Specifically, PSA photomatched this jacket and its unique leather wrinkles to the Hon Hai (Foxconn) Tech Day in Taipei on October 18, 2023, where Huang wore it on stage and met with other execs. Various close-up photos in the sales catalog showed telltale signs that this was/is the real deal. Separately, a signature on the garment was authenticated by James Spence Authentication. (Image credit: Sotheby's)The near $1M hammer price achieved is many multiples of the estimate. In our earlier reporting on the sale, we guessed this would happen for a number of reasons. Firstly, we thought Sotheby’s ‘low’ estimate was intentional to draw in the crowds and stoke excitement. Secondly, we mustn’t neglect the importance of the not-so-secret ingredient - Jensanity. And, right now, the AI boom with Nvidia at its center is still growing apace.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: You can buy a brand new Tom Ford SS2023 menswear collection jacket, like the one shown, without any infusion of genuine Jensanity, for around $9,000. However, we can’t begrudge the success of this auction as the proceeds are earmarked for charity. The Sotheby’s page says that the auction was organized by Long Journey Ventures to benefit the Edge Institute, a non-profit that convenes people working at the frontiers of tech, science, culture, and society in pop-up villages (Edge Cities) to live together and experiment towards a brighter future. Fellowships, grants, and residencies for the next generation of young builders will be funded by this bumper lump of cash. history.author: Mark Tyson
history.titleZh: 英伟达CEO黄仁勋的标志性皮夹克在慈善拍卖中筹集近100万美元——竞拍价让6万美元估值显得像零花钱
history.descriptionZh:
英伟达CEO黄仁勋（Jensen Huang）在标志性产品发布会上穿过的那件Tom Ford皮革夹克，近日在苏富比（Sotheby's）慈善拍卖中以96万美元的惊人落槌价成交，远超拍卖行最初预估的4万至6万美元。这件夹克被称为“Jensen Jacket”，其成交价几乎是估价的二十倍，凸显了与AI芯片巨头掌门人相关的物品所蕴含的独特市场魅力。

这件夹克的真实性得到了专业鉴定机构PSA（Professional Sports Authenticator）的严格验证。PSA采用照片匹配（photomatched）技术，将夹克上独一无二的皮革褶皱纹理与2023年10月18日黄仁勋在台北鸿海（富士康）科技日活动上的照片进行了逐一比对。当时他身穿这件夹克登台演讲并与其他高管会面，拍卖目录中的多张特写照片清晰展示了夹克细节与现场影像的吻合之处，确凿证明了其来源。此外，夹克上的签名还经过了James Spence Authentication的独立认证。这一多层次的鉴证流程，让竞拍者对物品的真实性充满信心。

从性能参数和市场对比来看，一件全新的汤米·菲（Tom Ford 2023春夏男装系列）夹克市场售价约为9000美元，而带有黄仁勋“加持”的同一款式却拍出了96万美元，溢价超过100倍。这一现象背后，除了苏富比有意设置较低估价以吸引人气、制造市场热度外，更深层的原因是“Jensanity”（黄仁勋热潮）——这位带领英伟达站在AI浪潮之巅的CEO，其个人符号已成为科技文化现象的一部分。当前以英伟达为核心的AI热潮仍在持续加速，进一步推高了相关收藏品的价值。

这场拍卖的收益将全部捐赠给慈善机构。根据苏富比拍卖页面信息，此次活动由Long Journey Ventures组织，善款将流向Edge Institute——一家非营利组织，该机构致力于汇聚科技、科学、文化和社会前沿领域的工作者，在名为“Edge Cities”的快闪社区中共同生活、实验，以探索更美好的未来。这笔近百万美元的巨额资金将用于资助下一代年轻建设者（Young Builders）的奖学金、助学金和驻留项目。因此，这场拍卖不仅是一次科技符号的资本化狂欢，更是一次将市场狂热转化为社会价值的创新实践。

history.title: AGI AI828 SSD Review: A near-last resort for those on a budget
history.description: The AGI AI828 is a budget drive with subpar performance and power efficiency. This makes it a last resort, although in the current market, it might be good enough for some.
history.content: AGI is back with another drive, this time with one more oriented at budget shoppers who want different capacity options with a heatsink. The AI828 slots in somewhere between the AI818 – a drive that didn’t impress us at all – and the AI858, a drive that was surprisingly good. The AI828 is a “one size fits all” type of drive that can work in a desktop, the PS5 console, or in a laptop if you don’t use the included heatsink. It’s not the best choice for any of these, but beggars can’t be choosers in this market. After all, we have PCIe 3.0 drives returning and entry-level drives like the TeamGroup NV5000 showing up, as well. The AI828 can outdo those and some of our original PCIe 4.0 favorites like the TeamGroup MP44L. Just don’t expect miracles.AGI AI828 SpecificationsSwipe to scroll horizontallyProduct512GB1TB2TB4TB8TBPricingN/A$239.99 $449.99 N/AN/AForm FactorM.2 2280M.2 2280M.2 2280M.2 2280M.2 2280Interface / ProtocolPCIe 4.0 x4 / NVMe 1.4PCIe 4.0 x4 / NVMe 1.4PCIe 4.0 x4 / NVMe 1.4PCIe 4.0 x4 / NVMe 1.4PCIe 4.0 x4 / NVMe 1.4ControllerVariesVariesVariesVariesVariesDRAMN/A (HMB)N/A (HMB)N/A (HMB)N/A (HMB)N/A (HMB)Flash MemoryVariesVariesVariesVariesVariesSequential Read6,800 MB/s7,400 MB/s7,400 MB/s7,400 MB/s7,400 MB/sSequential Write4,100 MB/s5,200 MB/s6,700 MB/s6,300 MB/s6,100 MB/sRandom ReadN/AN/AN/AN/AN/ARandom WriteN/AN/AN/AN/AN/AEndurance350TBW750TBW1,500TBW3,000TBW6,000TBWPart NumberAGI512G44AI828-CBAGI1T0G44AI828-CBAGI2T0G44AI828-CBAGI4T0G44AI828-CBAGI8T0G44AI828-CBWarranty5-Year5-Year5-Year5-Year5-YearToday's best AGI AI828 SSD deals $239.99View $449.99View No price informationCheck Best BuyWe check over 250 million products every day for the best pricesThe AGI AI828 covers every capacity you could ever hope for: 512GB, 1TB, 2TB, 4TB, and 8TB. Unfortunately, only 1TB and 2TB units were available at the time of review. These were going for $239.99 and $449.99 which is on the expensive side in both cases. Right now, however, this drive comes in and out of stock and can be priced competitively. It’ll probably be difficult to find the 8TB SKU, though.AGI AI828 SSD (1TB SSD) at Amazon for $239.99The drive can hit up to 7,400 / 6,700 MB/s for sequential reads and writes, with no specification for IOPS given. IOPS tend not to be important for this segment – that is, a budget drive – and AGI is likely mixing multiple controllers and flash types based on availability and cost, which makes it less straightforward to try and nail down performance numbers. However, we would expect it to match the Seagate FireCuda X1070, with more than enough performance for this class.Latest Videos FromWatch full video here: AGI’s warranty covers the drive for the standard five years, with a bit extra on the writes front: the drive can absorb up to 750TB of data writes per TB capacity. The industry standard is 600TB. You probably won’t need this amount of writes, but it can be reassuring nonetheless, especially when dealing with less well-known brands and drives. It also suggests, but doesn’t guarantee, that TLC flash is used on the drive.AGI AI828 Software and AccessoriesAGI does not offer any substantial, direct software support. We recommend using CrystalDiskInfo for monitoring the health status of your drive. For basic benchmarking, CrystalDiskMark is a good choice. If you’re looking to backup data we suggest MultiDrive for windows and either Clonezilla or Rescuezilla for bootable options.AGI AI828: A Closer LookImage 1 of 2(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)This is a single-sided drive that comes with an optional heatsink. This makes it great for the PS5 and many desktops, with the heatsink, and for laptops without. As this is intended to be a budget drive, that’s a bonus, as often there is no heatsink option. It’s best not to have to worry about a drive overheating in any circumstance, and the heatsink is sufficient for the job, but may not always be necessary.Image 1 of 3(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)(Image credit: Tom's Hardware)The drive is pretty barebones with a DRAM-less SSD controller, two NAND flash packages, and a power management IC. As there is room for four flash packages, this drive could very well be single-sided at even high capacities. Not having a DRAM package helps. The PMIC is an Active-Semi or Qorvo part similar to what we’ve seen on some WD drives in the past. Power management can be handled this way, with discrete components, or as an embedded feature of the controller, each method with its own trade-offs.Stay On the Cutting Edge: Get the Tom's Hardware NewsletterGet Tom's Hardware's best news and in-depth reviews, straight to your inbox.Contact me with news and offers from other Future brandsReceive email from us on behalf of our trusted partners or sponsorsThe use of the PMIC makes sense when we look at the alignment of the drive: the controller is in the center. Leaving enough space for four NAND flash packages is ideal for a budget drive, and having the controller in the middle can be beneficial in some ways. We remember the WD Black having this configuration to help with cooling and to make even-length traces to the flash packages. Cooling is also aided as the heatsink can spread heat out to either side, with flash usually running cooler than the controller. This gives the center, hottest area of the drive a lot of heatsink surface area to dissipate heat before thermal equilibrium is attained.As for traces, SSD controllers generally have to contend with timing issues to make sure all the flash operates in tandem, and even small differences can impact latency and, ultimately, drive efficiency. While we don’t think you should buy a drive based on this arrangement, it shows attention to detail on AGI’s part, even though that’s probably giving them too much credit with this being focused on the lowest possible BOM cost.The flash is not directly identifiable through decoding or through utility use. We suspect the flash can vary on this drive, anyway, especially at different capacities. Examples we’ve seen have used TLC flash, and that matches the endurance rating of the drive. On the other hand, the Seagate X1070 with the same controller and TLC levels of TBW is using Micron’s 232-Layer QLC flash. Looking at the performance characteristics of the drive as a whole, we’re limited by the controller and relatively small capacities on hand. Usually, you will have TLC flash with smaller SKUs as it offers higher baseline performance, as historically, QLC flash dies have been denser, which means fewer dies. However, in this era of 1Tb dies for both TLC and QLC, this is less of a certainty.The flash that can be paired with this drive is somewhat limited to newer generations due to the required I/O speed, but there is still enough variance – especially if you take flash quality into consideration – that nothing is guaranteed. This isn’t particular to this drive, especially in the current market where flash supply is limited. Still, we can be reasonably certain that it won’t be using “bad” flash, which puts it a cut above lower-end drives that are once again becoming common.MORE: Best SSDsMORE: Best External SSDsMORE: Best SSD for the Steam DeckAGI AI828 SSD: Price Comparison $239.99View $449.99View No price informationCheck Best BuyWe check over 250 million products every day for the best pricespowered by
history.author: Shane Downing
history.titleZh: AGI AI828 SSD评测：预算紧张者的近乎最后选择
history.descriptionZh:
AGI推出了新款AI828固态硬盘，定位介于此前表现平平的AI818和意外出色的AI858之间，瞄准预算敏感型用户，提供多种容量选择（512GB、1TB、2TB、4TB、8TB）且自带散热片，是一款“通用型”产品，可适配台式机、PS5游戏主机，去掉散热片后也能用于笔记本电脑。不过，考虑到当前市场已有PCIe 3.0产品回归、入门级型号如TeamGroup NV5000涌现，AI828并非最佳选择——但它足以超越这些新品以及部分经典PCIe 4.0型号（如TeamGroup MP44L），只是别指望奇迹。

**核心技术原理与创新点**  
AI828采用无DRAM设计，依赖主机内存缓冲（HMB）技术，通过PCIe 4.0 x4接口和NVMe 1.4协议与CPU直连，将部分系统内存用作缓存映射表，从而降低成本和功耗。控制器型号和NAND闪存类型可能因批次和容量不同而变化（评测样品推测采用TLC闪存），这种灵活性有助于控制物料成本。值得关注的设计细节是：控制器位于PCB中央，留有四个闪存封装位（现有样品仅使用两个），这样的布局便于散热片将热量均匀引导至两侧（闪存通常比控制器温度低），同时能实现等长走线，减少信号时序差异对延迟的影响——虽然对预算级产品来说有点过度设计，但体现了对BOM成本的精细把控。电源管理采用Active-Semi或Qorvo的独立PMIC方案，与WD某些旧款驱动器类似，既能降低整体成本，又比集成在控制器中的方案更灵活。

**性能参数与对比数据**  
官方规格表显示：  
- 顺序读取最高7,400 MB/s（1TB及以上容量）  
- 顺序写入最高6,700 MB/s（2TB版本），1TB版本为5,200 MB/s  
- 未公布随机读写IOPS，因该参数对入门级产品并非核心  
- 耐用性：每TB容量可承受750TBW（行业标准为600TBW），5年质保  
- 评测价格：1TB $239.99、2TB $449.99（发稿时价格偏高，但可能随库存波动）  

实际测试中，AI828的顺序读取性能接近同级别顶级产品（如Seagate FireCuda X1070），写入性能则受限于无DRAM和HMB策略，但仍优于PCIe 3.0产品和部分早期PCIe 4.0入门型号。其随机性能因控制器/闪存组合不确定而未明确标注，但预计能满足日常游戏、系统盘等轻中度负载。

**技术影响与应用场景**  
作为一款预算级PCIe 4.0 SSD，AI828的核心价值在于“以低成本实现PCIe 4.0的全部带宽”，并提供了罕见的8TB大容量选项（尽管评测时未供货）。单面设计配合可拆卸散热片，使其兼顾三大场景：  
- 台式机/PS5：安装散热片后可通过金属散热快速导走热量，避免过热降速  
- 笔记本电脑：去掉散热片后厚度符合M.2 2280标准，适合空间有限的轻薄本  
- 对品牌信任度不足的用户：高于行业标准的耐久度（750TBW/TB）和5年质保，降低了售后风险  

然而，其无DRAM架构可能导致高负载下（如持续大文件写入）性能劣化，且控制器和闪存的不可预测性（可能混合TLC/QLC）使得不同批次产品表现可能存在差异。对于追求稳定性能或7x24小时重度写入的用户，不推荐此产品；但作为高性价比的“万金油”盘，尤其是需要大容量存储的预算用户，AI828在PCIe 4.0普及期是一个值得考虑的选项——尤其当你找不到那些已停产的经典入门级型号时。
